tree.name: Ja'Kobe Walter
tree.note: Drafted 19th overall in 2024. Selected with the least favorable of IND's two 2024 1st round picks, acquired in the Pascal Siakam trade (Jan 17, 2024).

assetsGivenUp.name: Pascal Siakam
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: TOR traded Pascal Siakam to IND for Bruce Brown, Kira Lewis Jr., Jordan Nwora, a 2024 1st (IND own, became Isaiah Collier — re-traded to UTA), a 2024 1st (least favorable, became Ja'Kobe Walter #19), and a 2026 1st (IND own).
